div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Argentina (Weddell)
div.p: 139. Your 252, September 5, 9 p.m. Rublee has been informed that the Argentine authorities have now modified their regulations in order to permit all persons in Germany who have valid visas and who leave Germany before October 1 to enter the Argentine.This information had been received by the Department in Rublee’s telegram No. 1013, September 24, 3 p.m., from the Ambassador in the United Kingdom, not printed.

In discussing with the Minister of Foreign Affairs the subject outlined in the Department’s 138, September 22, 8 p.m.,Not printed. please take occasion to express to him this Government’s gratification at this manifestation of the humanitarian attitude of the Argentine Government.
